rationale: Both correctly diagnose the #4527 regression (None inter-stage payload starving the full-payload consumer) and correctly identify PR #4792 as the merged fix already folded into the 0.24 rebase commit, matching the thread exactly, and both correctly recommend closing. X goes further by explaining the actual hang mechanism (_FULL_PAYLOAD_INPUT_STAGES gating, accumulate_full_payload_output gating, coordinator/scheduler timeout log lines) and ties it precisely to the reporter's log output and version, while quoting the ground-truth code comment verbatim. Y reaches the same conclusion but pads with less-grounded extras (claimed NPU runner impact, a specific regression test path) not evidenced in the thread, and leaves in raw internal 'run report' scaffolding that undercuts it as a polished maintainer answer.
